name.value: BgLZ - XIS Server - Scenario 1.1 - Serve BgLZ resources of XXX-Mutter - JSON Format

description.value: Scenario 1.1 - Serve BgLZ resources of XXX-Mutter
OAuth Token for current patient
Serve Patient resource including the patient's general practitioner for HCIM Patient
Test XIS server to servePatient resources.
Confirm that the operation was succesful
Confirm that the returned resource type is Bundle.
Confirm that the returned Bundle type is searchset.
Confirm that the returned Bundle total value matches or is less than the number of entries in the Bundle. The included resources should not be counted as entries in the Bundle.total.
Confirm that the returned Bundle contains a self link.
Confirm that Bundle does not use Burgerservicenummer (BSN) anywhere.
Confirm that Bundle does not use Burgerservicenummer (BSN) in the self link.
Confirm that all returned resources except OperationOutcome and Binary contain a meta.profile tag.

Confirm that all returned resources contain an Resource.id except when temporary ids are used in the Bundle. The only time that a resource does not have an id is when it is being submitted to the server using a create operation: https://www.hl7.org/fhir/STU3/resource-definitions.html#Resource.id
Confirm that the fullUrl does not disagree with the id in the resource, see http://hl7.org/fhir/stu3/bundle-definitions.html#Bundle.entry.fullUrl
Confirm that the fullUrl is an absolute URL, an uuid or an oid.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.fullUrl.all( startsWith('http://') or startsWith('https://') or matches('^urn:oid:[0-2](\\.(0|[1-9]\\d*))*$') or matches('^urn:uuid:[A-Fa-f\\d]{8}-[A-Fa-f\\d]{4}-[A-Fa-f\\d]{4}-[A-Fa-f\\d]{4}-[A-Fa-f\\d]{12}$') )

description.value: Confirm that literal References (Reference.reference) are an absolute URL, a relative URL or an internal fragment reference (contained), see: http://hl7.org/fhir/stu3/references.html#literal.

expression.value: Bundle.descendants().reference.all( startsWith('http://') or startsWith('https://') or startsWith('#') or matches('^urn:oid:[0-2](\\.(0|[1-9]\\d*))*$') or matches('^urn:uuid:[A-Fa-f\\d]{8}-[A-Fa-f\\d]{4}-[A-Fa-f\\d]{4}-[A-Fa-f\\d]{4}-[A-Fa-f\\d]{12}$') or (startsWith('urn:').not() and startsWith('#').not() and matches('^[A-Za-z]{3,}/[^/]+$')) )

description.value: Confirm that all References have a display value, see https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/MedMij:V2020.01/FHIR_IG#Use_of_the_reference_datatype.

Confirm that all CodeableConcept elements contain either a coding.display or a text value if no Coding exists or has an extension (e.g. a nullFlavor or data-absent-reason extension). For more information see https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/MedMij:V2020.01/FHIR_IG#Use_of_coded_concepts.
Confirm that the returned Bundle conforms to the base FHIR specification and the resources to the stated profiles in the meta.profile tag.
Confirm that the returned searchset Bundle contains 1 Patient resource.
Confirm that the returned searchset Bundle contains 1 Practitioner resource.
Automatically generated checks to test if the contents of the message from the previous test adheres to the corresponding addendum
Check if resource 'Patient-1' selected with expression can be matched to exactly one resource.
Patient-1: meta.profile equals 'http://fhir.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/nl-core-patient'.
Patient-1: identifier contains Identifier.
Patient-1: name contains nested element.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.select(resource as Patient).name.where($this.extension.where(url='http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-assembly-order').value = 'NL1' and $this.family.where($this = 'XXX_Mutter' and $this.extension.where(url='http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-own-name').value) and $this.given.where($this = 'Fiona' and $this.extension.where(url='http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/iso21090-EN-qualifier').value = 'BR') and $this.given.where($this = 'F.' and $this.extension.where(url='http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/iso21090-EN-qualifier').value = 'IN')).exists()

description.value: Patient-1: telecom contains nested element.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.select(resource as Patient).telecom.where($this.extension.where(url='http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/zib-ContactInformation-TelecomType').value.coding.where($this.system = 'http://hl7.org/fhir/v3/AddressUse' and $this.code = 'MC' and $this.display) and $this.system = 'phone' and $this.value = +31634567891 and $this.use = 'home').exists()

description.value: Patient-1: telecom contains nested element.
Patient-1: gender equals 'female' and contains nested element.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.select(resource as Patient).gender.where($this = 'female' and $this.extension.where(url='http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/code-specification').value.coding.where($this.system = 'http://hl7.org/fhir/v3/AdministrativeGender' and $this.code = 'F' and $this.display)).exists()

description.value: Patient-1: birthDate equals DateTime '1964-02-08'.
Patient-1: address contains nested element.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.select(resource as Patient).address.where($this.extension.where(url='http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/zib-AddressInformation-AddressType').value.coding.where($this.system = 'http://hl7.org/fhir/v3/AddressUse' and $this.code = 'PST' and $this.display) and $this.use = 'home' and $this.type = 'postal' and $this.line.where($this = 'Knolweg 1001' and $this.extension.where(url='http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/iso21090-ADXP-streetName').value and $this.extension.where(url='http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/iso21090-ADXP-houseNumber').value) and $this.city = 'Stitswerd' and $this.postalCode = '9999XX' and $this.country.where($this = 'Nederland' and $this.extension.where(url='http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/code-specification').value.coding.where($this.system = 'urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.16.34' and $this.code = '6030' and $this.display))).exists()

description.value: Patient-1: multipleBirth equals false.
Patient-1: contact contains nested element.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.select(resource as Patient).contact.where($this.relationship.coding.where($this.system = 'http://hl7.org/fhir/v3/RoleCode' and $this.code = 'SONC' and $this.display) and $this.relationship.coding.where($this.system = 'urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.3.11.22.472' and $this.code = '1' and $this.display) and $this.name.where($this.extension.where(url='http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-assembly-order').value = 'NL1' and $this.family.where($this = 'Prins' and $this.extension.where(url='http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-own-name').value) and $this.given.where($this = 'Robert' and $this.extension.where(url='http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/iso21090-EN-qualifier').value = 'BR') and $this.given.where($this = 'R.' and $this.extension.where(url='http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/iso21090-EN-qualifier').value = 'IN')) and $this.telecom.where($this.extension.where(url='http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/zib-ContactInformation-TelecomType').value.coding.where($this.system = 'http://hl7.org/fhir/v3/AddressUse' and $this.code = 'MC' and $this.display) and $this.system = 'phone' and $this.value = '06-34567891' and $this.use = 'home') and $this.telecom.where($this.system = 'email' and $this.value = 'bprins@123net.nl' and $this.use = 'home')).exists()

description.value: Patient-1: generalPractitioner contains Reference.
Check if resource 'Practitioner-1' selected with expression can be matched to exactly one resource.
Practitioner-1: meta.profile equals 'http://fhir.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/nl-core-practitioner'.
Practitioner-1: name contains nested element.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.select(resource as Practitioner).name.where($this.family.where($this = 'van Oosten-Lanen' and $this.extension.where(url='http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-own-name').value) and $this.given.where($this = 'Laura' and $this.extension.where(url='http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/iso21090-EN-qualifier').value = 'BR') and $this.given.where($this = 'L.' and $this.extension.where(url='http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/iso21090-EN-qualifier').value = 'IN')).exists()

description.value: Serve Condition resource(s) for HCIM Problem
Test XIS server to serve Condition resources.
Confirm that the operation was succesful
Confirm that the returned resource type is Bundle.
Confirm that the returned Bundle type is searchset.
Confirm that the returned Bundle total value matches or is less than the number of entries in the Bundle. The included resources should not be counted as entries in the Bundle.total.
Confirm that the returned Bundle contains a self link.
Confirm that Bundle does not use Burgerservicenummer (BSN) anywhere.
Confirm that Bundle does not use Burgerservicenummer (BSN) in the self link.
Confirm that all returned resources except OperationOutcome and Binary contain a meta.profile tag.

Confirm that all returned resources contain an Resource.id except when temporary ids are used in the Bundle. The only time that a resource does not have an id is when it is being submitted to the server using a create operation: https://www.hl7.org/fhir/STU3/resource-definitions.html#Resource.id
Confirm that the fullUrl does not disagree with the id in the resource, see http://hl7.org/fhir/stu3/bundle-definitions.html#Bundle.entry.fullUrl
Confirm that the fullUrl is an absolute URL, an uuid or an oid.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.fullUrl.all( startsWith('http://') or startsWith('https://') or matches('^urn:oid:[0-2](\\.(0|[1-9]\\d*))*$') or matches('^urn:uuid:[A-Fa-f\\d]{8}-[A-Fa-f\\d]{4}-[A-Fa-f\\d]{4}-[A-Fa-f\\d]{4}-[A-Fa-f\\d]{12}$') )

description.value: Confirm that literal References (Reference.reference) are an absolute URL, a relative URL or an internal fragment reference (contained), see: http://hl7.org/fhir/stu3/references.html#literal.

expression.value: Bundle.descendants().reference.all( startsWith('http://') or startsWith('https://') or startsWith('#') or matches('^urn:oid:[0-2](\\.(0|[1-9]\\d*))*$') or matches('^urn:uuid:[A-Fa-f\\d]{8}-[A-Fa-f\\d]{4}-[A-Fa-f\\d]{4}-[A-Fa-f\\d]{4}-[A-Fa-f\\d]{12}$') or (startsWith('urn:').not() and startsWith('#').not() and matches('^[A-Za-z]{3,}/[^/]+$')) )

description.value: Confirm that all References have a display value, see https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/MedMij:V2020.01/FHIR_IG#Use_of_the_reference_datatype.

Confirm that all CodeableConcept elements contain either a coding.display or a text value if no Coding exists or has an extension (e.g. a nullFlavor or data-absent-reason extension). For more information see https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/MedMij:V2020.01/FHIR_IG#Use_of_coded_concepts.
Confirm that the returned Bundle conforms to the base FHIR specification and the resources to the stated profiles in the meta.profile tag.
Confirm that the returned searchset Bundle contains 8 Condition resources.
Automatically generated checks to test if the contents of the message from the previous test adheres to the corresponding addendum
Check if resource 'Condition-1' selected with expression can be matched to exactly one resource.
Condition-1: meta.profile equals 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/zib-Problem'.
Condition-1: clinicalStatus equals 'active' and contains nested element.
Condition-1: category contains CodeableConcept with correct system and code.
Condition-1: code contains CodeableConcept with correct system and code.
Condition-1: subject contains Reference.
Condition-1: onset equals DateTime '2018-01-13T00:00:00Z'.
Condition-1: note contains nested element.
Check if resource 'Condition-2' selected with expression can be matched to exactly one resource.
Condition-2: meta.profile equals 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/zib-Problem'.
Condition-2: clinicalStatus equals 'active' and contains nested element.
Condition-2: category contains CodeableConcept with correct system and code.
Condition-2: code contains CodeableConcept with correct system and code.
Condition-2: subject contains Reference.
Condition-2: onset equals DateTime '2004'.
Check if resource 'Condition-3' selected with expression can be matched to exactly one resource.
Condition-3: meta.profile equals 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/zib-Problem'.
Condition-3: clinicalStatus equals 'active' and contains nested element.
Condition-3: category contains CodeableConcept with correct system and code.
Condition-3: code contains CodeableConcept with correct system and code.
Condition-3: subject contains Reference.
Condition-3: onset equals DateTime '2018-01-13T00:00:00Z'.

Condition-4: meta.profile equals 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/zib-Problem'.
Condition-4: clinicalStatus equals 'active' and contains nested element.
Condition-4: category contains CodeableConcept with correct system and code.
Condition-4: code contains CodeableConcept with correct system and code.
Condition-4: subject contains Reference.
Condition-4: onset equals DateTime '2018-01-13T00:00:00Z'.

Condition-5: clinicalStatus equals 'active' and contains nested element.

Condition-5: code contains CodeableConcept with correct system and code.

Condition-6: code contains CodeableConcept with correct system and code.

Condition-7: meta.profile equals 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/zib-Problem'.
Condition-7: clinicalStatus equals 'active' and contains nested element.
Condition-7: category contains CodeableConcept with correct system and code.
Condition-7: code contains CodeableConcept with correct system and code.
Condition-7: subject contains Reference.
Condition-7: onset equals DateTime '2018-01-13T00:00:00Z'.

Condition-8: meta.profile equals 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/zib-Problem'.
Condition-8: clinicalStatus equals 'active' and contains nested element.
Condition-8: category contains CodeableConcept with correct system and code.
Condition-8: code contains CodeableConcept with correct system and code.
Condition-8: subject contains Reference.
Condition-8: onset equals DateTime '2018-01-13T00:00:00Z'.
